agent.name: Marketplace Listing Moderator (Production)
agent.description: Vision-enabled agent for the Listing Moderator app. Examines a marketplace listing photo (with optional seller caption), checks it against marketplace listing policies, and returns a strict JSON moderation report (is_listing_photo, violations, advisory_flags, quality_score, confidence).

definition.name: Marketplace Listing Moderator

child_steps.name: Vision moderation
child_steps.purpose: Examine the listing image (and optional seller caption) against marketplace policies and emit a strict JSON moderation report.

child_steps.name: Return moderation result
child_steps.purpose: Emit the LLM JSON output as the agent's final output
